name: normalized-100m
status: LIVE — this is the genesis distribution; total == TangleToken.MAX_SUPPLY (100M) => true fixed supply
description: Raw snapshot normalized to exactly 100,000,000 TNT. Two steps: (1) DROP the expired OG airdrop claims entirely (not allocated); (2) reduce ONLY the Treasury bucket to hit 100M. Claimant buckets (substrate/foundation) are byte-identical to the raw snapshot.

derivation.method: drop expired, then treasury = totalSupply - (substrate + evm + foundation)
derivation.note: totalReduction (109.26M - 100M) == droppedExpired (3.19M) + treasuryHaircut (6.06M). No active claimant is affected.

evm.note: no active EVM claims; expired EVM airdrop is dropped

inflation.note: 1% of 100M, treasury-funded via InflationPool.fund() (not minted); ~35.6M treasury sustains a flat 1% for ~35yr

pending: Amounts are taken from the current packages/migration-claim outputs (merkle-tree.json block 8116528, treasury/foundation carveouts, evm-claims empty, unclaimed excluded). Treat as final once the canonical mainnet snapshot is confirmed; treasury always re-balances so substrate+evm+foundation+treasury == 100M exactly (enforced by deploy/distributions/reconcile.py + the FullDeploy genesis==MAX_SUPPLY assertion).
